title: configure fails to find libsystemc.so
body:
systemc-2.3.4 is installed, but configure fails:
```
configure:9503: checking whether SystemC is found (in system path)
configure:9520: c++ -o conftest -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include   -isystem /usr/local/include   -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   conftest.cpp  -lsystemc >&5
conftest.cpp:22:70: warning: non-void function does not return a value [-Wreturn-type]
                     extern "C" int sc_main(int argc, char* argv[]) {}
                                                                     ^
1 warning generated.
ld: error: undefined symbol: sc_core::sc_api_version_2_3_4_cxx201703L<&sc_core::SC_DISABLE_VIRTUAL_BIND_UNDEFINED_>::sc_api_version_2_3_4_cxx201703L(sc_core::sc_writer_policy)
>>> referenced by conftest.cpp
>>>               /tmp/conftest-1963fa.o:(_GLOBAL__sub_I_conftest.cpp)
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
```

Version: 5.016
FreeBSD 13.2
code_blocks:
configure:9503: checking whether SystemC is found (in system path)
configure:9520: c++ -o conftest -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include   -isystem /usr/local/include   -fstack-protector-strong -L/usr/local/lib   conftest.cpp  -lsystemc >&5
conftest.cpp:22:70: warning: non-void function does not return a value [-Wreturn-type]
                     extern "C" int sc_main(int argc, char* argv[]) {}
                                                                     ^
1 warning generated.
ld: error: undefined symbol: sc_core::sc_api_version_2_3_4_cxx201703L<&sc_core::SC_DISABLE_VIRTUAL_BIND_UNDEFINED_>::sc_api_version_2_3_4_cxx201703L(sc_core::sc_writer_policy)
>>> referenced by conftest.cpp
>>>               /tmp/conftest-1963fa.o:(_GLOBAL__sub_I_conftest.cpp)
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
